title: plumeria rubra f. lutea
intro: Plumeria rubra f. lutea, also known as the yellow frangipani, is a variety of the Plumeria rubra plant, a flowering evergreen shrub native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Plumeria rubra f. lutea include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Plumeria rubra f. lutea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be made by infusing the plant's flowers and leaves in a carrier oil or water.
